ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Diagnosis class (0 for benign, 1 for malignant) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of diagnosis */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "menopause" INTEGER /* Menopause status (1 for pre-menopausal, 4 for post-menopausal) */,
  "tumor_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tumor (in mm) */,
  "inv_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of involved lymph nodes */,
  "node_caps" INTEGER /* Node caps (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "deg_malig" INTEGER /* Degree of malignancy (1-10 scale) */,
  "breast" INTEGER /* Breast affected (1 for left, 2 for right, 3 for both) */,
  "breast_quad" INTEGER /* Quadrant of the breast affected (1-4 scale) */,
  "irradiat" INTEGER /* Irradiation status (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of breast cancer (e.g., mother, sister, none) */,
  "genetic_mutations" TEXT /* Genetic mutations associated with breast cancer (e.g., BRCA1, BRCA2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_data" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered (e.g., surgery, chemotherapy) */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of treatment administration */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to treatment (e.g., complete response, partial response, no response) */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication used during treatment */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of medication (in mg) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of treatment (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clinical trial */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for patients to participate */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the clinical trial (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_trials" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient participating in the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical trial */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of patient enrollment */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of patient completion or withdrawal */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the trial for the patient (e.g., complete response, partial response, no response) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
